arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Harry Kane thinks he’s doing “something right” after hitting goal scoring milestone in win against Holstein Kiel
arts.sum: Awesome, then check out our Bavarian Podcast Works — Postgame Show, where we break it all down from the starting XI to the scoring and subs to our final takeaways on the match! Harry Kane got a brace in Bayern Munich ’s near capitulation against Holstein Kiel.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany critical of Bayern Munich’s finish in 4-3 win over Holstein Kiel
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s overall dominance over Holstein Kiel was not at all represented in the final 4-3 scoreline, but Kiel’s two late goals made it a cagey ending for the Rekordmeister . The second half goals from Kiel’s Finn Porath and two from Steven Skrzybski in the 91st and 93rd minute really cut into Bayern’s four-goal lead and very nearly sparked what would have been the most embarrassing bottle job from Bayern had Kiel found a fourth.

arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala unhappy with Bayern Munich’s 4-3 win over Holstein Kiel
arts.sum: Bayern Munich were at one point 4-0 up over Holstein Kiel, but the full-time score somehow reads 4-3. Looking for more thoughts and analysis of Bayern Munich’s Bundesliga win over Holstein Kiel?

arts.ttl: Luke McCowan declares Celtic believe they CAN beat Bayern Munich as he issues UEFA plea before Allianz dream
arts.sum: McCowan says there's no point in Celtic turning up against Vincent Kompany's side in the Champions League if they don't think they can win

arts.ttl: “He’s just impressive” — Vincent Kompany raves about Harry Kane after two more goals for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Bayern Munich trounced Holstein Kiel...or was on its way to, rather, before two late goals in what should have been garbage time made it 4-3. Awesome, then check out our Bavarian Podcast Works — Postgame Show, where we break it all down from the starting XI to the scoring and subs to our final takeaways on the match!

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Christoph Freund says it’s possible that Mathys Tel stays
arts.sum: Bayern Munich sporting director Christoph Freund is just trying to keep his head above water at this point when it comes to transfer rumors involving Mathys Tel. Before the match, Freund was asked if Tel was really going to leave and the executive gave the best response that he could.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany maintains calm after Bayern Munich wobble: “We played well for 80 minutes.”
arts.sum: After Joshua Kimmich had his turn commenting on the manner in which Bayern Munich nearly squandered a 4-0 lead against Holstein Kiel this afternoon, Bayern trainer Vincent Kompany addressed the…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich provide Mathys Tel update after Man United-linked forward is left out of squad
arts.sum: Bayern Munich sporting director Christoph Freund explains why Manchester United-linked Mathys Tel was not involved in Saturday's Bundesliga contest with Holstein Kiel.

arts.ttl: ‘We’re lacking the hunger for 90 minutes’ – Joshua Kimmich questions Bayern Munich’s mentality
arts.sum: Bayern Munich were 4-0 up and coasting against newly-promoted Holstein Kiel on Saturday afternoon, but three goals in 30 minutes – two of which came in stoppage time – made…

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Postgame Show: Bayern Munich 4-3 Holstein Kiel (Bundesliga)
arts.sum: Bayern Munich was convincing in capturing the win (until a late defensive collapse), which saw the Bavarians look dominant for extended stretches. Despite playing a low block for extended stretches, Holstein Kiel was also more willing to test Bayern Munich than most other teams.
